title: o (lmine-N-acetylacetone) Benzene Sulphonic Acid as a Gravimetric Reagent for Cobalt(Il), Nickel(Il) and Copper(II)
author: M. R. MALI
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Jodhpur, Jodhpur. 

 Manuscript received 24 November 1975; revised 13 March 1976; accepted 27 April 1976 

  o -(lmine·N-acetylacetone) benzene sulphonic acid (H 2 AB) has been used as a Mravlmetrk: reagtnt for Co(ll), Ni(ll) and Cu(ll). The solid metal chelates formed p0111ess 1:1 metal-ligand stoichiometry. On the basis of magnetic and I.R. studies octahedral structures are suggested for these chelates.
